blended.narrative: Norquay is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,050 ft. Looking ahead, 28 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 14°F. Expect powder.
